name: ICC A117.1-2017 Accessible & Usable Buildings and Facilities
source_authority: International Code Council (ICC) / ANSI A117 Committee
copyright_notice: ICC A117.1-2017 © 2017 International Code Council, Inc.

rules.label: Walking Surfaces – Width & Slope
rules.notes_template: Verify accessible walking surfaces ≥ 36 in. clear width (32 in. allowed for ≤ 24 in.); cross slope ≤ 1:48; running slope ≤ 1:20.
rules.citation: ICC A117.1-2017 §403 – Accessible walking surfaces width and slope (parallel to ADA §403).

rules.label: Doors and Doorways
rules.notes_template: Verify doors per §404: 32-in. clear width, maneuvering clearances per Table 404.2.3, hardware 34–48 in. AFF, force ≤ 5 lbf.
rules.citation: ICC A117.1-2017 §404 – Doors and doorways: clear width, maneuvering clearances, hardware, opening force.
rules.remediation: Detail every accessible door per §404 including maneuvering clearance diagrams.

rules.label: Type A Dwelling/Sleeping Units
rules.notes_template: Type A units (≥ 4 units in non-elevator buildings, certain percentages elsewhere): full accessible kitchen, bath, doors, hardware, controls; reinforced for grab bars.
rules.citation: ICC A117.1-2017 §1004 – Type A dwelling/sleeping units (more accessible than Type B), required by IBC Chapter 11 in certain residential building types.
rules.remediation: Identify required Type A units and detail all interior elements per §1004.

rules.label: Type B Dwelling/Sleeping Units (FHA-equivalent)
rules.notes_template: Type B units approximate Fair Housing Act seven design requirements: accessible building entrance, accessible/usable common spaces, usable doors, accessible route, accessible environmental controls, reinforced bathroom walls, usable kitchens/baths.
rules.citation: ICC A117.1-2017 §1005 – Type B dwelling/sleeping units, used to satisfy FHA design requirements via IBC Chapter 11.
rules.remediation: Detail every Type B unit per §1005; this also satisfies the FHA's seven design requirements when adopted by reference.
